docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-16-2023 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SANDOVAL, ELBER IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CHAVEZ, PATRICIA DEFENDANT ALSO AGREES THAT THE LEASE AGREEMENT IS INVALID TO COLLECT ON ALLEGED UNPAID THREE MONTHS RENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SANDOVAL, ELBER ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
TRIAL RESET TO SEP-13-2023 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF AUG-23-2023 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
TRIAL RESET TO OCT-16-2023 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF SEP-13-2023 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM OR HEARING OFFICER FILED BY SANDOVAL, ELBER CHAVEZ, PATRICIA
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY SANDOVAL, ELBER AS TO DEFENDANT CHAVEZ, PATRICIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-23-2023 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION TO RESET FILED BY PLAINTIFF SANDOVAL, ELBER
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $40. SERVED AUG-28-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CHAVEZ, PATRICIA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-16-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-16-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM PANG LY. PLAINTIFF ELBER SANDOVAL IS PRESENT AND IS ASSISTED BY SPANISH-LANGUAGE COURT INTERPRETER DANIEL NAVARRO (#300802). DEFENDANT PATRICIA CHAVEZ IS PRESENT AND IS ASSISTED BY SPANISH-LANGUAGE COURT INTERPRETER PATRICE BINAISA (#301593). NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: S. KANE. NOT REPORTED. (D. 506)
